[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28417468/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Taichi Koike — Main Group Element Chemistry</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Mono:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg:      #f7f5f0;
  --bg2:     #eeeae2;
  --surf:    #ffffff;
  --border:  rgba(30,48,80,0.1);
  --border2: rgba(30,48,80,0.06);
  --text:    #1a2438;
  --muted:   #5c6e84;
  --accent:  #0a6e5c;
  --accent2: #4a3a98;
  --gold:    #7a5f1a;
  --serif:   'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
  --sans:    'Corbel', 'Gill Sans MT', 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif;
  --mono:    'DM Mono', monospace;
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--sans);overflow-x:hidden;line-height:1.65}
:lang(ja), .jp-text{font-family:'Meiryo','Hiragino Sans','Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN',sans-serif}

/* ── Subtle grid texture ── */
body::before{
  content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(30,48,80,.025) 1px,transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(30,48,80,.025) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:40px 40px;
}

/* ── Nav ── */
nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  padding:1.3rem 5vw;
  background:rgba(247,245,240,0.88);
  backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  transition:background .3s;
}
.nav-brand{
  font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:400;
  letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--text);text-decoration:none;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;
}
.nav-dot{
  width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--accent);display:inline-block;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2rem;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{
  font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;
  transition:color .2s;position:relative;
}
.nav-links a::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-3px;left:0;right:0;
  height:1.5px;background:var(--accent);
  transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .25s;
}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--text)}
.nav-links a:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}

/* ── Sections ── */
section{position:relative;z-index:1;padding:7rem 5vw}
.sec-max{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto}
.label{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.67rem;letter-spacing:.22em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.7rem;margin-bottom:1rem;
}
.label::before{content:'';width:18px;height:1.5px;background:var(--accent)}
h2{
  font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.15;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:3rem;
}
h2 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)}
.divider{height:1px;background:var(--border);max-width:100%}

/* ── Hero ── */
#hero{
  min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;
  padding-top:6rem;padding-left:10vw;padding-right:10vw;
  position:relative;
}
/* watermark molecule */
#hero::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;right:6vw;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
  width:340px;height:340px;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(10,110,92,.07) 0%,transparent 70%);
  border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;
}
.hero-label{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.22em;
  color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:1.6rem;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .8s .15s forwards;position:relative;z-index:1;
}
.hero-name{
  font-family:var(--serif);
  font-size:clamp(3.8rem,8.5vw,8rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:.95;
  position:relative;z-index:1;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .9s .3s forwards;
}
.hero-name .en{display:block;color:var(--text);letter-spacing:-.01em}
.hero-name .jp{
  display:block;font-style:italic;font-size:.5em;
  color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.06em;margin-top:.2em;
  font-weight:300;
}
.hero-sub{
  margin-top:2rem;max-width:560px;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .9s .5s forwards;
  position:relative;z-index:1;
}
.hero-pos{font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.4rem}
.hero-inst{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75}
.hero-badges{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.45rem;margin-top:1.2rem}
.badge{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.07em;
  padding:.28rem .75rem;
  border-radius:20px;
}
.badge-teal{background:rgba(10,110,92,.09);color:var(--accent);border:1px solid rgba(10,110,92,.2)}
.badge-neu{background:rgba(30,48,80,.06);color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.hero-cta{
  display:flex;gap:1rem;margin-top:2.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .9s .7s forwards;position:relative;z-index:1;
}
.btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.45rem;
  padding:.72rem 1.7rem;border-radius:3px;
  font-family:var(--sans);font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;
  letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  text-decoration:none;transition:all .25s;
}
.btn-p{background:var(--accent);color:#fff}
.btn-p:hover{background:#0a8570;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(10,110,92,.2)}
.btn-o{border:1.5px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);background:transparent}
.btn-o:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.hero-scroll{
  position:absolute;bottom:2.5rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.15em;color:var(--muted);
  opacity:0;animation:fadeIn 1s 1.3s forwards;
}
.scroll-bar{width:1px;height:28px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--accent),transparent);animation:pulse 2s infinite}

/* ── Science feature ── */
.science-feature{
  background:var(--surf);
  border:1px solid rgba(10,110,92,.25);
  border-left:4px solid var(--accent);
  padding:2.2rem 2.5rem;margin-bottom:3rem;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:2rem;align-items:center;
  box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(10,110,92,.07);
}
.sf-badge{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.2em;
  color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.5rem;text-transform:uppercase;
}
.sf-title{
  font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:400;
  color:var(--text);line-height:1.35;margin-bottom:.45rem;
}
.sf-journal{font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-size:.95rem;color:var(--gold)}
.sf-journal span{font-style:normal;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-left:.5rem}
.sf-desc{margin-top:.7rem;font-size:.83rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;max-width:520px}
.sf-link{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.07em;
  padding:.7rem 1.2rem;border:1.5px solid var(--accent);
  color:var(--accent);text-decoration:none;border-radius:3px;
  transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;
}
.sf-link:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff}

/* ── Research cards ── */
.rg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.rc{
  background:var(--surf);
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:2rem 1.7rem;
  transition:box-shadow .3s,transform .3s,border-color .3s;
  cursor:default;position:relative;
}
.rc::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));
  transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .4s;
}
.rc:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(30,48,80,.1);transform:translateY(-3px);border-color:rgba(10,110,92,.2)}
.rc:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.rc-n{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.8rem}
.rc-t{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.6rem;line-height:1.3}
.rc-d{font-size:.83rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.78}
.tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.3rem;margin-top:1.1rem}
.tag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.6rem;padding:.2rem .55rem;
  border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);border-radius:2px;letter-spacing:.05em;
  background:var(--bg2);}

/* ── Publications ── */
.pub{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:3.5rem 1fr auto;gap:0 1.8rem;
  align-items:start;padding:1.5rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);
  transition:background .2s;
}
.pub:hover{background:rgba(10,110,92,.025);margin:0 -.8rem;padding-left:.8rem;padding-right:.8rem;border-radius:4px}
.pub-y{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.7rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--accent);padding-top:.12rem}
.pub-t{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.pub-au{font-size:.79rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.15rem}
.pub-au strong{color:var(--text);font-weight:500;border-bottom:1.5px solid rgba(10,110,92,.3)}
.pub-j{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--gold)}
.pub-doi{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.65rem;color:var(--accent);
  text-decoration:none;border:1.5px solid rgba(10,110,92,.3);
  padding:.25rem .65rem;border-radius:3px;white-space:nowrap;
  transition:all .2s;
}
.pub-doi:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent)}
.feature-pub .pub-t{color:var(--accent);font-weight:400}
.feature-pub{background:rgba(10,110,92,.025);margin:0 -.8rem;padding-left:.8rem;padding-right:.8rem;border-radius:4px}

/* ── CV ── */
.cv-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:start}
.about-p{font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.9;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1.1rem}
.about-p strong{color:var(--text);font-weight:600}
.cv-section{margin-bottom:2.2rem}
.cv-head{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.2em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);
  margin-bottom:.8rem;padding-bottom:.45rem;
  border-bottom:1.5px solid rgba(10,110,92,.15);
}
.cv-item{
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;
  gap:1rem;padding:.48rem 0;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);font-size:.84rem;
}
.cv-item-main{color:var(--text);font-weight:500}
.cv-item-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:.75rem;text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;font-family:var(--mono)}
.cv-item-inst{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);display:block;font-weight:400}
.star{color:var(--gold);margin-right:.3rem}

/* grants */
.grant-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.7rem}
.grant-item{
  background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:1rem 1.3rem;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;gap:0 1.1rem;
  align-items:start;border-radius:3px;
}
.grant-period{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.62rem;color:var(--accent);white-space:nowrap;padding-top:.1rem}
.grant-title{font-size:.86rem;color:var(--text);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.12rem}
.grant-body{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted)}

/* ── Contact ── */
#contact{background:var(--bg2);border-top:1px solid var(--border);max-width:100%;padding:0}
#contact .sec-max{padding:7rem 5vw;text-align:center}
.contact-links{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:.7rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:2.5rem 0}
.clink{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.45rem;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.07em;
  padding:.75rem 1.3rem;border:1.5px solid var(--border);
  color:var(--text);text-decoration:none;border-radius:3px;
  background:var(--surf);
  transition:all .22s;
  box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(30,48,80,.05);
}
.clink:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(10,110,92,.1)}
.clink svg{width:13px;height:13px;flex-shrink:0}

footer{
  position:relative;z-index:1;border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:1.6rem 5vw;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.63rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.07em;
  background:var(--bg);
}

/* ── Animations ── */
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.25}50%{opacity:.9}}
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px);transition:opacity .65s ease,transform .65s ease}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:none}
.d1{transition-delay:.1s}.d2{transition-delay:.2s}.d3{transition-delay:.3s}

@media(max-width:900px){
  nav{padding:1rem 1.2rem}
  .nav-links{gap:1rem}
  section{padding:5rem 1.2rem}
  #hero{padding-left:1.2rem;padding-right:1.2rem}
  .rg{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .cv-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:3rem}
  .science-feature{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:1.6rem}
  .feat-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr !important}
  .pub{grid-template-columns:3rem 1fr;gap:0 .9rem}
  .pub-doi{display:none}
  footer{flex-direction:column;gap:.4rem;text-align:center}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-brand"><span class="nav-dot"></span>Taichi Koike</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#research">Research</a></li>
    <li><a href="#publications">Publications</a></li>
    <li><a href="#cv">CV</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-label">Assistant Professor · The University of Tokyo</div>
  <h1 class="hero-name">
    <span class="en">Taichi Koike</span>
  </h1>
  <div class="hero-sub">
    <p class="hero-pos">Organic Functional Design Group · Dept. of Chemistry &amp; Biotechnology</p>
    <p class="hero-inst">
      Graduate School of Engineering, The University of Tokyo<br>
      Toyota Riken Scholar &nbsp;·&nbsp; JST ACT-X Researcher &nbsp;·&nbsp; RIKEN Visiting Researcher
    </p>
    <div class="hero-badges">
      <span class="badge badge-teal">Low-coordinate main group</span>
      <span class="badge badge-teal">Carbon atom transfer</span>
      <span class="badge badge-neu">Silicon chemistry</span>
      <span class="badge badge-neu">Carbene / Silylene</span>
      <span class="badge badge-neu">Unusual bonding</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-cta">
    <a href="#publications" class="btn btn-p">Publications</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-o">Contact / Links</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll">
    <div class="scroll-bar"></div>
    scroll
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- RESEARCH -->
<section id="research">
  <div class="sec-max">
    <p class="label reveal">Research</p>
    <h2 class="reveal">Molecules <em>at the frontier</em><br>of bonding and reactivity</h2>

    <!-- Two corresponding-author featured papers -->
    <div class="feat-grid reveal" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.2rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem">
      <div class="science-feature" style="margin-bottom:0">
        <div>
          <div class="sf-badge">★ Corresponding Author · ACIE 2026</div>
          <div class="sf-title">Azetidinylideneketenimines as a Multimodal Synthetic Platform</div>
          <div class="sf-journal">Angew. Chem. Int. Ed. <span>2026, accepted</span></div>
          <p class="sf-desc">Coordination chemistry and cycloaddition-triggered transformations of isolable azetidinylideneketenimines — a versatile reactive platform built on strained four-membered rings.</p>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.1569919" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="sf-link">DOI →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="science-feature" style="margin-bottom:0">
        <div>
          <div class="sf-badge">★ Corresponding Author · JACS 2023</div>
          <div class="sf-title">Cyclobutenylidene: A Multifaceted Two-Coordinate Carbon Species</div>
          <div class="sf-journal">J. Am. Chem. Soc. <span>2023, 145, 9264–9272</span></div>
          <p class="sf-desc">The first isolable cyclobutenylidene, obtained via skeletal editing of a cyclopropenylidene — a carbene with rich reactivity arising from its strained bicyclic carbon framework.</p>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.3c00961" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="sf-link">DOI →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Science 2024 -->
    <div class="science-feature reveal" style="border-left-color:var(--accent2);border-color:rgba(74,58,152,.2);background:rgba(74,58,152,.03)">
      <div>
        <div class="sf-badge" style="color:var(--accent2)">Science 2024</div>
        <div class="sf-title">Ph₃PCN₂: A stable reagent for carbon-atom transfer</div>
        <div class="sf-journal">Science <span>2024, 385, 305–311</span></div>
        <p class="sf-desc">Stable phosphorus ylide Ph₃PCN₂ enables stoichiometric and catalytic single-atom carbon transfer — a previously elusive transformation now unlocked as a practical synthetic tool.</p>
      </div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1126/science.adp0260" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="sf-link" style="border-color:var(--accent2);color:var(--accent2)">
        <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"/><polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"/><line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"/></svg>
        Open in Science
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="rg">
      <div class="rc reveal">
        <div class="rc-n">01</div>
        <div class="rc-t">Low-valent Main Group Element Chemistry</div>
        <p class="rc-d">Synthesis and characterization of low-coordinate silicon and carbon species with unusual electronic structures — silylones, silylenes, carbenes, and beyond. Stabilized by sterically demanding ligands, these molecules challenge conventional bonding theories.</p>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Silylene</span><span class="tag">Carbene</span><span class="tag">Silylone</span><span class="tag">Low-coordinate Si</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rc reveal d1">
        <div class="rc-n">02</div>
        <div class="rc-t">Carbon &amp; Main Group Atom Transfer Chemistry</div>
        <p class="rc-d">Design of isolable, bench-stable reagents for single-atom transfer reactions. The carbon-atom transfer reagent Ph₃PCN₂ (Science 2024) opens new retrosynthetic disconnections impossible with classical methods.</p>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Atom transfer</span><span class="tag">Ylide chemistry</span><span class="tag">Diazo compounds</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rc reveal d2">
        <div class="rc-n">03</div>
        <div class="rc-t">Exotic π-Electron Systems &amp; Unusual Bonding</div>
        <p class="rc-d">Exploration of silicon-based π systems with non-classical bonding — 3-electron-2-center bonds, hypervalent/hypoelectronic species, and strained ring systems. Experiment guided by quantum chemical computation.</p>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Si=B bond</span><span class="tag">Radical anion</span><span class="tag">π systems</span><span class="tag">DFT</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- PUBLICATIONS -->
<section id="publications">
  <div class="sec-max">
    <p class="label reveal">Publications</p>
    <h2 class="reveal">Selected <em>papers</em></h2>

    <div class="reveal">

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2026</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Azetidinylideneketenimines as a Multimodal Synthetic Platform: Coordination Chemistry and Cycloaddition-Triggered Transformations</div>
          <div class="pub-au"><strong>T. Koike*</strong>, K. Ito, S. Ishida, T. Iwamoto*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">Angew. Chem. Int. Ed. 2026, accepted</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.1569919" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2025</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Cyclic (Alkyl)(amino)silylene Aluminum(III) Iodide Complex and Its Nucleophile Dependent Reactivities</div>
          <div class="pub-au"><strong>T. Koike</strong>, A. Sato, N. Sakurata, T. Iwamoto*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">Organometallics 2025, 44, 1013–1017</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.organomet.5c00093" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2025</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Ph₃PC – A Monosubstituted C(0) Atom in Its Triplet State</div>
          <div class="pub-au">Y. Kutin, <strong>T. Koike</strong>, M. Drosou, A. Schnegg, D. Pantazis*, M. Kasanmascheff*, M. M. Hansmann*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">Angew. Chem. Int. Ed. 2025, 64, e202424166</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.202424166" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2024</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Ph₃PCN₂: A stable reagent for carbon-atom transfer</div>
          <div class="pub-au"><strong>T. Koike</strong>, J.-K. Yu, M. M. Hansmann*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">Science 2024, 385, 305–311</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1126/science.adp0260" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2024</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Isolable Si=B Analogue of a Vinyl Halide: A Building Block for Facile Access toward Silicon–Boron Multiple Bonded Species</div>
          <div class="pub-au"><strong>T. Koike</strong>, N. Sakurata, S. Ishida, T. Iwamoto*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">Angew. Chem. Int. Ed. 2024, 63, e202411283</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.202411283" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2024</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Cycloadditions of Diazoalkenes with P₄ and <i>t</i>BuCP: Access to Diazaphospholes</div>
          <div class="pub-au">S. Hauer, J. Reitz, <strong>T. Koike</strong>, M. M. Hansmann*, R. Wolf*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">Angew. Chem. Int. Ed. 2024, e202410107</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.202410107" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2023</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Cyclobutenylidene: A Multifaceted Two-Coordinate Carbon Species Obtained via Skeletal Editing of a Cyclopropenylidene</div>
          <div class="pub-au"><strong>T. Koike*</strong>, T. Iwamoto*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">J. Am. Chem. Soc. 2023, 145, 9264–9272</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.3c00961" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2022</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Synthesis, Structure and Electronic Properties of a Stable π-Type 3-Electron-2-Center-Bonded Species: A Silicon Analogue of a Bicyclo[1.1.0]butane Radical Anion</div>
          <div class="pub-au"><strong>T. Koike</strong>, R. Osawa, S. Ishida, T. Iwamoto*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">Angew. Chem. Int. Ed. 2022, 61, e202117584</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/anie.202117584" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2022</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Twisted Push–Pull Disilenes Obtained by Direct 1,2-Hydro/Chloroborylation of a Silylone</div>
          <div class="pub-au"><strong>T. Koike</strong>, T. Iwamoto*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">Chem. Commun. 2022, 58, 8061–8064</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1039/D2CC02702E" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2021</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Conformationally Switchable Silylone: Electron Redistribution Accompanied by Ligand Reorientation around a Monatomic Silicon</div>
          <div class="pub-au"><strong>T. Koike</strong>, T. Nukazawa, T. Iwamoto*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">J. Am. Chem. Soc. 2021, 143, 14332–14341</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.1c06726" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2021</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">Intermolecular C–H Activation at the Allylic/Benzylic and Homoallylic/Homobenzylic Positions of Cyclic Hydrocarbons by a Stable Divalent Silicon Species</div>
          <div class="pub-au"><strong>T. Koike</strong>, T. Kosai, T. Iwamoto*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">Chem. Eur. J. 2021, 27, 724–734</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/chem.202003749" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

      <div class="pub">
        <div class="pub-y">2019</div>
        <div>
          <div class="pub-t">1,4-Dehydrogenation with a Two-Coordinate Cyclic (Alkyl)(amino)silylene</div>
          <div class="pub-au"><strong>T. Koike</strong>, T. Kosai, T. Iwamoto*</div>
          <div class="pub-j">Chem. Eur. J. 2019, 25, 9295–9302</div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/chem.201901826" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="pub-doi">DOI →</a>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div style="margin-top:2.5rem" class="reveal">
      <a href="https://researchmap.jp/taichi.koike/published_papers" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-o">Full list on researchmap →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- CV -->
<section id="cv">
  <div class="sec-max">
    <p class="label reveal">About &amp; CV</p>
    <h2 class="reveal"><em>Career</em> &amp; biography</h2>

    <div class="cv-grid" style="grid-template-columns:190px 1fr 1fr">
      <div class="reveal" style="padding-top:.3rem">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Taichi Koike" style="width:100%;border-radius:4px;display:block;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(30,48,80,.12)">
      </div>
      <div class="reveal d1">
        <p class="about-p">
          I am an <strong>Assistant Professor</strong> in the Department of Chemistry and Biotechnology, Graduate School of Engineering, The University of Tokyo (Masai Group). My research explores the chemistry of <strong>low-coordinate and low-valent main group elements</strong> — molecules that push the boundaries of classical bonding theory.
        </p>
        <p class="about-p">
          I synthesize and characterize highly reactive, often unprecedented species such as free carbenes, silylones, and exotic π-bonded systems. A key focus is developing <strong>stable reagents for atom-transfer reactions</strong> — inspired by the discovery of Ph₃PCN₂ as a practical carbon-atom transfer agent (<i>Science</i> 2024).
        </p>
        <p class="about-p">
          I also hold concurrent appointments as a <strong>Toyota Riken Scholar</strong> and a <strong>Visiting Researcher at RIKEN</strong>, and pursue JST ACT-X research on click-type reactions of low-coordinate elements as a route to functional π-electron materials.
        </p>
        <div style="margin-top:1.8rem">
          <a href="#" class="btn btn-o">Download CV (PDF) ↓</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="reveal d2">
        <div class="cv-section">
          <div class="cv-head">Positions</div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">Assistant Professor</span><span class="cv-item-inst">The University of Tokyo</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2025–</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">Toyota Riken Scholar</span><span class="cv-item-inst">Toyota Physical &amp; Chemical Research Institute</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2025–</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">JST ACT-X Researcher</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2025–</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">Visiting Researcher</span><span class="cv-item-inst">RIKEN</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2025–</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">Postdoctoral Fellow (Humboldt)</span><span class="cv-item-inst">TU Dortmund (Prof. M. M. Hansmann)</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2023–25</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">JSPS Research Fellow DC1</span><span class="cv-item-inst">Tohoku University (Prof. T. Iwamoto)</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2020–23</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="cv-section">
          <div class="cv-head">Education</div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">Ph.D. Chemistry</span><span class="cv-item-inst">Tohoku University</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2023</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">M.Sc. Chemistry</span><span class="cv-item-inst">Tohoku University</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2020</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">B.Sc. Chemistry</span><span class="cv-item-inst">Tohoku University</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2018</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="cv-section">
          <div class="cv-head">Selected Awards</div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="star">★</span><span class="cv-item-main">JSPS Ikushi Prize（育志賞）</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2023</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="star">★</span><span class="cv-item-main">Inoue Research Award（井上研究奨励賞）</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2024</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">Tohoku Univ. President's Award</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2023</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">Aoba Foundation Prize</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2023</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">Chemistry Letters Young Researcher Award</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2022</span>
          </div>
          <div class="cv-item">
            <div><span class="cv-item-main">Ohtsu Conference Award Fellow</span></div>
            <span class="cv-item-sub">2022</span>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-top:.5rem;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.62rem;color:var(--muted)">
            + 9 further presentation / poster awards
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="cv-section">
          <div class="cv-head">Research Funding</div>
          <div class="grant-list">
            <div class="grant-item">
              <div class="grant-period">2026–28</div>
              <div><div class="grant-title">Toyota Riken Scholar</div><div class="grant-body">B,N-π functionalization reagents for unexplored π-electron materials</div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="grant-item">
              <div class="grant-period">2025–28</div>
              <div><div class="grant-title">JST ACT-X</div><div class="grant-body">Click-type reactions of low-coordinate main group elements for functional chemistry (JPMJAX25D6)</div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="grant-item">
              <div class="grant-period">2025–27</div>
              <div><div class="grant-title">JSPS Grant-in-Aid（スタート支援）</div><div class="grant-body">Low-coordinate main group element photoredox chemistry (25K23580)</div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="grant-item">
              <div class="grant-period">2023–25</div>
              <div><div class="grant-title">Alexander von Humboldt Fellowship</div><div class="grant-body">Carbon-atom transfer chemistry, TU Dortmund</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact" style="padding:0">
  <div class="sec-max">
    <p class="label reveal" style="justify-content:center">Contact</p>
    <h2 class="reveal" style="text-align:center">Get in <em>touch</em></h2>
    <p class="reveal" style="text-align:center;font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;color:var(--muted);font-size:1rem;margin-top:-1.8rem">
      Open to collaborations, seminar invitations, and prospective students &amp; postdocs.
    </p>
    <div class="contact-links reveal">
      <a href="mailto:tkoike@chembio.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp" class="clink">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m22 7-10 7L2 7"/></svg>
        tkoike@chembio.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
      </a>
      <a href="https://researchmap.jp/taichi.koike" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="clink">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><circle cx="12" cy="8" r="4"/><path d="M2 20c0-4 4-7 10-7s10 3 10 7"/></svg>
        researchmap
      </a>
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6713-4375" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="clink">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M8 12h8M12 8v8"/></svg>
        ORCID
      </a>
      <a href="https://twitter.com/SiAdamas" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="clink">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M4 4l16 16M4 20L20 4"/></svg>
        @SiAdamas
      </a>
      <a href="https://jglobal.jst.go.jp/detail?JGLOBAL_ID=202101012847862418" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="clink">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M12 2L2 7l10 5 10-5-10-5z"/><path d="M2 17l10 5 10-5M2 12l10 5 10-5"/></svg>
        J-GLOBAL
      </a>
    </div>
    <p class="reveal" style="text-align:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.09em;line-height:2;padding-bottom:5rem">
      Dept. of Chemistry &amp; Biotechnology, Graduate School of Engineering<br>
      The University of Tokyo, Bunkyo-ku, Tokyo, Japan
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <span>© 2025 Taichi Koike</span>
  <span>Organic Functional Design Group · The University of Tokyo</span>
</footer>

<script>
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
},{threshold:.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
const nav = document.querySelector('nav');
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
  nav.style.background = scrollY>50
    ? 'rgba(247,245,240,0.97)'
    : 'rgba(247,245,240,0.88)';
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
